# dots-hyprland (Arch-only Fork)

Personal Arch Linux fork of [end-4/dots-hyprland](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland) with:
- Binary (non-git) dependencies only
- Kitty terminal (no ghostty/matugen)
- Iosevka Term Slab + Atkinson Hyperlegible fonts
- Hardcoded weather coords (no GPS)

## Install
```bash
./setup
```

## Credits
Based on [illogical-impulse](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland) by end-4.
